practice.name: Problem 6 (2024 AMC 8)
practice.statement: Sergei skated around an ice rink, gliding along different paths. The gray lines in the figures below show four of the paths labeled $P$, $Q$, $R$, and $S$. What is the sorted order of the four paths from shortest to longest?

practice.name: Problem 22 (2016 AMC 8)
practice.statement: Two congruent circles centered at points $A$ and $B$ each pass through the other circle's center. The line containing both $A$ and $B$ is extended to intersect the circles at points $C$ and $D$. The circles intersect at two points, one of which is $E$. What is the degree measure of $\angle CED$?

practice.name: Problem 9 (2017 AMC 10A)
practice.statement: Minnie rides on a flat road at $20$ kilometers per hour (kph), downhill at $30$ kph, and uphill at $5$ kph. Penny rides on a flat road at $30$ kph, downhill at $40$ kph, and uphill at $10$ kph. Minnie goes from town $A$ to town $B$, a distance of $10$ km all uphill, then from town $B$ to town $C$, a distance of $15$ km all downhill, and then back to town $A$, a distance of $20$ km on the flat. Penny goes the other way around using the same route. How many more minutes does it take Minnie to complete the $45$-km ride than it takes Penny?

practice.name: Problem 14 (2016 AMC 8)
practice.statement: Rectangle $DEFA$ below is a $3 \times 4$ rectangle with $DC = CB = BA = 1$. What is the area of the shaded region (the "bat wings")?
